title: Detection of Mitochondrial Permeability Transition Pore
author: Mengchen Shi
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kchcst6

steps.instruction: Cells were seeded at a density of 103 cells per well onto 6-well plates, and spontaneous apoptosis was induced through serum starvation for 48 h.

The cells were rinsed with GENMED cleaning solution and incubated with 1 ml GENMED staining solution for 20 min at 37℃ in the dark. The supernatant was subsequently discarded, and the cells were washed twice with GENMED cleaning solution.
Subsequently, the changes of MPTP were monitored using an inverted fluorescence microscope (Leica DMI4000B, Germany).
